text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of sterility and emptiness. The stark lighting, tilted perspective, and shadowy corridor evoke a mood of anticipation—perhaps even unease. I am reminded of the silence before something is revealed, the quietness of spaces that await purpose.

In the second scene, I feel intellectually curious and somewhat invigorated. The colorful wall, technological displays, and words about research and innovation stimulate my mind. Here, possibility pulses beneath the surface, inviting me to ponder the interplay of humans and machines and my own place in this unfolding story.
